name: SPINDLETOP OIL & GAS CO
summary: Spindletop Oil & Gas Co. is an independent oil and gas company engaged in exploration, development, production, and acquisition of oil and natural gas, operating primarily in Texas across five states. Through subsidiary Prairie Pipeline Co., it gathers and markets natural gas via owned pipelines. It also leases commercial office space in Dallas, Texas. Operations are concentrated in the Fort Worth Basin, East Texas, and other basins.

products.name: Crude Oil
products.description: Produced from operated and non-operated wells across Texas, Oklahoma, Alabama, New Mexico, and Louisiana.

products.name: Natural Gas
products.description: Produced and marketed from multiple basins, primarily the Fort Worth Basin in North Texas.

products.name: Natural Gas Gathering
products.description: Gathering and marketing of natural gas through subsidiary Prairie Pipeline Co. via owned pipelines in Texas.

products.name: Commercial Real Estate Leasing
products.description: Leasing of office space in Company-owned two-story building in Dallas, Texas to third-party tenants.

products.name: Oilfield Equipment Rental
products.description: Rental of oilfield equipment through a Company subsidiary.

partnerships.description: Largest purchaser of Company's oil and natural gas, representing 18% of sales in 2024.
Purchaser of Company's oil and natural gas, representing 9% of sales in 2024.
Purchaser of Company's oil and natural gas, representing 7% of sales in 2024.
